Uses of Package
sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation

Packages that use sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation
Package
Description
sc.fiji.snt
SNT core classes
sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation
Classes for curation of reconstructions, as implemented by the "Curation Assistant".
  • Classes in sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation used by sc.fiji.snt
    Class
    Description
    PlausibilityCheck.Severity
    Severity levels for plausibility warnings.
    PlausibilityCheck.Warning
    A plausibility warning produced by a check.
    PlausibilityMonitor
    Monitors tracing and editing operations for morphological plausibility.
    PlausibilityMonitor.WarningListener
    Listener interface for warning list changes.
  • Classes in sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation used by sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation
    Class
    Description
    CurationHistograms.Side
    Defines Which side of the threshold(s) constitutes a flagged value.
    CurationTags.Partition
    Four-bucket breakdown returned by CurationTags.partitionByReviewStatus(Tree).
    PlausibilityCalibrator.CalibrationResult
    Aggregated calibration results from a set of reference trees.
    PlausibilityCalibrator.CheckSummary
    Summary for a single calibrated parameter.
    PlausibilityCheck.DeepCheck
    A heavier check that scans an entire collection of paths for issues.
    PlausibilityCheck.ImpactKind
    Classifies how an error propagates through the reconstruction.
    PlausibilityCheck.LiveCheck
    A lightweight check that evaluates the plausibility of a single fork operation (parent + child + branch index).
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    Full distribution of a check's raw measurements across a reconstruction, collected without applying the warning threshold.
    PlausibilityCheck.Severity
    Severity levels for plausibility warnings.
    PlausibilityCheck.SignalQuality
    Assesses local image signal quality around traced paths and flags those in regions with poor contrast.
    PlausibilityCheck.Warning
    A plausibility warning produced by a check.
    PlausibilityMonitor
    Monitors tracing and editing operations for morphological plausibility.
    PlausibilityMonitor.WarningListener
    Listener interface for warning list changes.
